prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 20units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 65.1 kg; Height 178.1 cm; BMI 20.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 9.3%; current 10.1%), FPG (12 months ago 203mg/dL; 9 months ago 229mg/dL; 6 months ago 190mg/dL; 3 months ago 223mg/dL; current 266mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 65.9kg; 9 months ago 66.9kg; 6 months ago 62.7kg; 3 months ago 64.3kg; current 65.1kg), Height (12 months ago 178.1cm; 9 months ago 178.1cm; 6 months ago 178.1cm; 3 months ago 178.1cm; current 178.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 107U/L; 9 months ago 107U/L; 6 months ago 112U/L; 3 months ago 111U/L; current 115U/L), AST (12 months ago 51U/L; 9 months ago 51U/L; 6 months ago 52U/L; 3 months ago 50U/L; current 57U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 60mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 59mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 59mL/min/1.73m²; current 56mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 34mg/g; 9 months ago 46mg/g; 6 months ago 51mg/g; 3 months ago 53mg/g; current 50mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 89mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 51mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 112mg/dL; 9 months ago 116mg/dL; 6 months ago 99mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 105mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.39 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
